info.name: Smart Seaman BOS API
info.description:
Back Office System REST API for Smart Seaman platform.

**Required headers on every /v1/** request:**
- `language`: TH or EN
- `devicemodel`: client device model
- `correlationid`: unique request trace ID

**Protected endpoints** also require:
- `Authorization`: Bearer {{token}}

Run **Auth / Login** first — the test script auto-populates `{{token}}`.

variable.description: Change to http://localhost:8080 for local Maven run
JWT token — set automatically by the Login request test script
